iteration1.notes: Initial optimization: restructured skill for JSON output. Deferred criterion scored 0.25 — model put 0 tasks in deferred.

iteration2.notes: Clarified deferred rule: low-impact + non-today deadline. Deferred improved to 0.75 (2/3 correct).

iteration3.notes: Added classification priority order. Regressed to 0.5 deferred — model still mixing deferred/nice_to_have.

iteration4.notes: Added explicit decision tree and rule that nice_to_have never contains low-impact tasks. Perfect scores.

changes: Rewrote verbose skill as concise, task-type-specific guide with exact JSON output schemas
Added explicit decision tree for task categorization (must_do_today → deferred → should_do → nice_to_have)
Made deferred rule unambiguous: ALL low-impact non-today tasks go to deferred, never nice_to_have
Added detailed time_blocks rules for scheduling: HH:MM format, no overlaps, fixed commitments as blocks
